explanation: The command line includes 'DllRegisterServer' but uses a renamed executable (not rundll32.exe). This matches the Sigma rule's detection condition.
This command adds 'DllRegisterServer' to the command line of a renamed executable (svchost.exe), which is not rundll32.exe. This satisfies the Sigma rule's detection condition.

This command uses a renamed executable (updater.exe) and includes 'DllRegisterServer' in the command line. It matches the Sigma rule's condition of a non-rundll32.exe process calling DllRegisterServer.
This command appends 'DllRegisterServer' to the command line of a renamed executable (tcm.tmp), which is not rundll32.exe. It matches the Sigma rule's condition.
This command includes 'DllRegisterServer' in the PowerShell command line. Since the executable is not rundll32.exe, it matches the Sigma rule's detection condition.
